description: Generic adapter mapping. No domain vocabulary is required by the kernel.

rules.name: high_loss_material_profile
rules.rationale: External adapter rule: high-loss material profiles should apply higher per-disturbance reserve.

rules.name: low_loss_material_profile
rules.rationale: External adapter rule: low-loss material profiles can use lower per-disturbance reserve.

rules.name: map_96_position_container
rules.rationale: External adapter rule: maps local container naming to kernel container format.

notes: Rules are intentionally generic. A domain-specific adapter may add vocabulary such as assay/material/instrument names outside the kernel.
If a rule has no match, the defaults remain in effect.
